selection: 按 4–7 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: n. 一点点, 少许, 一会儿, 短时间；a. 小的, 很少的, 幼小的, 琐碎的, 短暂的, 矮小的
words.definition: n. a small amount or duration

words.translation: n. 市场, 交易, 集市, 推销地区, 行情, 市面, 销路；vt. 在市场上交易, 使上市, 销售
words.definition: n. the world of commercial activity where goods and services are bought and sold

words.translation: n. 黑色, 黑颜料；a. 黑色的
words.definition: n. the quality or state of the achromatic color of least lightness (bearing the least resemblance to white)

words.translation: n. 家, 避难所, 故乡；a. 家庭的, 国内的, 打中目标的
words.definition: n. where you live at a particular time

words.translation: n. 头, 头脑, 领袖, 脑袋, 最前的部分；vt. 为首, 朝向, 前进, 用头顶
words.definition: n. the upper part of the human body or the front part of the body in animals; contains the face and brains

words.translation: n. 猪, 猪肉, 贪婪的人, 猪一样的人；v. 生小猪, 象猪般地生活
words.definition: n. a crude block of metal (lead or iron) poured from a smelting furnace

words.translation: n. 环, 环形物, 拳击场, 戒指, 角逐, 小集团, 铃声, 钟声, 声调；vt. 包围, 套住, 按铃, 敲钟
words.definition: n. a characteristic sound

words.translation: n. 国王, 君主；vt. 使...成为君主
words.definition: n. a male sovereign; ruler of a kingdom

words.translation: a. 简单的, 普通的, 朴素的, 单纯的, 绝对的, 初级的, 原始的, 迟钝的；n. 出身低微者, 傻子
words.definition: a. having few parts; not complex or complicated or involved

words.translation: n. 城镇, 市, 镇
words.definition: n. an urban area with a fixed boundary that is smaller than a city

words.translation: adv. 在后地；prep. 在...背后
words.definition: r. in or to or toward the rear

words.translation: a. 失去的, 遗失的, 迷惑的；lose的过去式和过去分词
words.definition: a. no longer in your possession or control; unable to be found or recovered

words.translation: n. 鞋, 靴, 外胎；vt. 给...穿鞋, 为马钉蹄铁
words.definition: n. footwear shaped to fit the foot (below the ankle) with a flexible upper of leather or plastic and a sole and heel of heavier material

words.translation: n. 棍, 棒, 刺, 枯枝, 茎, 条状物；vt. 插进, 刺入, 钉住, 伸出, 粘贴, 停止
words.definition: n. an implement consisting of a length of wood

words.translation: vt. 建立, 创立, 铸造；find的过去式和过去分词
n. 脂肪, 脂油, 肥肉；a. 肥的, 胖的, 油腻的
words.definition: n. a soft greasy substance occurring in organic tissue and consisting of a mixture of lipids (mostly triglycerides)

words.translation: n. 主人, 硕士, 大师, 母机；a. 主人的, 主要的
words.definition: n. directs the work of others

words.translation: n. 失误, 避免, 失败, 小姐；vt. 未得到, 未达到, 未听到, 未觉察, 逃脱, 遗漏, 错过, 思念
words.definition: n. a failure to hit (or meet or find etc)

words.translation: adv. 离去
words.definition: r. from a particular thing or place or position (`forth' is obsolete)

words.translation: vt. 买, 获得；vi. 买
words.definition: v. obtain by purchase; acquire by means of a financial transaction

words.translation: n. 全部, 完整；a. 充满的, 完全的, 丰富的, 完美的, 丰满的, 详尽的
n. 薪资, 付款, 补偿；vt. 支付, 付清, 补偿, 偿还, 对...有利, 为...涂防水物
adv. 一起, 共同, 彼此
words.definition: r. in contact with each other or in proximity

words.translation: n. 水, 雨水, 海水, 水位, 水面, 流水；vt. 给...浇水, 供以水, 注入水, 使湿
words.definition: n. binary compound that occurs at room temperature as a clear colorless odorless tasteless liquid; freezes into ice below 0 degrees centigrade and boils above 1

words.translation: n. 白色, 洁白, 眼白, 白种人, 蛋白；a. 白色的, 纯洁的, 白种的, 苍白的, 空白的, 幸运的
words.definition: n. the quality or state of the achromatic color of greatest lightness (bearing the least resemblance to black)

words.translation: n. 袋子, 袋状物；vt. 使膨大, 装袋, 猎获
words.definition: n. a flexible container with a single opening

words.translation: n. 床, 睡眠处, 河床, 底座, 路基, 一层；vt. 提供宿处, 栽种, 安装
words.definition: n. a piece of furniture that provides a place to sleep

words.translation: n. 跳舞, 舞蹈, 舞会；v. 跳舞
words.definition: n. an artistic form of nonverbal communication

words.translation: v. 吃, 腐蚀
words.definition: v. take in solid food

words.translation: n. 王后, 女王；vt. 立为女王
words.definition: n. the only fertile female in a colony of social insects such as bees and ants and termites; its function is to lay eggs

words.translation: n. 心跳(声), 打, 敲打声, 拍子；v. 打, 拍打, 打败
words.definition: n. a regular route for a sentry or policeman

words.translation: n. 书, 书籍, 帐簿, 名册, 工作簿；v. 登记, 预订
words.definition: n. a written work or composition that has been published (printed on pages bound together)

words.translation: n. 男孩
n. 褐色；a. 褐色的
words.definition: n. an orange of low brightness and saturation

words.translation: n. 颜色, 面色, 颜料, 外貌；vt. 把...涂上颜色, 粉饰, 使脸红, 歪曲
n. 课程, 路线, 过程, 一道菜, 道路；v. 追, (使)跑
words.definition: n. education imparted in a series of lessons or meetings

words.translation: n. 落下, 瀑布, 采伐量, 下降, 落差, 降低, 堕落, 秋天；vi. 倒下, 落下, 来临, 失守, 阵亡, 下跌, 减弱, 倾斜, 垮台, 轮到, 变成, 降低
words.definition: n. the season when the leaves fall from the trees

words.translation: n. 父亲, 祖先, 长辈, 神父, 创始者；vt. 当...的父亲, 保护, 创作, 发明, 培养
words.definition: n. a male parent (also used as a term of address to your father)

words.translation: vt. 种植, 使长满；vi. 生长, 变成, 发展
words.definition: v. become larger, greater, or bigger; expand or gain

words.translation: n. 陆地, 地面, 地界, 地产, 国土, 土地；vi. 登陆, 登岸, 到达
words.definition: n. the land on which real estate is located

words.translation: n. 铅, 铅条, 领导, 超前量, 领引, 榜样, 主角, 导线；vt. 引导, 带领, 领导, 指挥, 致使, 加铅于, 用铅包
words.definition: n. an advantage held by a competitor in a race

words.translation: n. 早晨, 早上, 初期
words.definition: n. the time period between dawn and noon

words.translation: n. 夜, 夜晚, 晚上, 黑暗, 夜晚的工作
words.definition: n. the time after sunset and before sunrise while it is dark outside

words.translation: n. 羊, 胆小者
words.definition: n. woolly usually horned ruminant mammal related to the goat

words.translation: n. 旁边, 侧, 方面, 胁, 侧边, 血统；a. 旁的, 侧的, 次要的
words.definition: n. a place within a region identified relative to a center or reference location

words.translation: a. 确信, 必然的, 必定的；adv. 当然, 确实地, 无疑地
words.definition: s. physically secure or dependable

words.translation: n. 想法, 思想, 思维, 关心, 挂念；think的过去式和过去分词
words.definition: n. the organized beliefs of a period or group or individual

words.translation: n. 墙, 墙壁, 垣, 内壁, 分界物, 屏障；a. 墙的
words.definition: n. an architectural partition with a height and length greater than its thickness; used to divide or enclose an area or to support another structure

words.translation: n. 妻子, 太太, 夫人
words.definition: n. a married woman; a man's partner in marriage

words.translation: prep. 在旁边
words.definition: n. At the side of; on one side of.

words.translation: n. 碗, 木球, 大酒杯；v. 滚木球, 快而稳地行驶
words.definition: n. a round vessel that is open at the top; used chiefly for holding food or liquids;

words.translation: a. 左边的, 左倾的, 左侧的, 左派的；adv. 在左面
n. 月亮, 月球, 月光；vi. 闲荡
words.definition: n. the natural satellite of the Earth

words.translation: a. 明智的, 慎虑的, 聪明的, 博学的, 狡猾的, 机灵的；vi. 知道

words.translation: n. 发射, 炮弹, 射击, 射手, 投篮, 射门, 子弹, 射程, 拍摄, 注射；vt. 装弹, 使成颗粒状

words.translation: a. 孤独的, 单独的, 独自的；adv. 独自地

words.translation: n. 感冒, 寒冷；a. 寒冷的, 冷淡的, 冷静的

words.translation: n. 展览会, 市集, 美好的事物；a. 公平的, 按规则进行的, 不好不坏的, 晴朗的, 美丽的

words.translation: a. 快速的, 紧的；adv. 很快地, 紧紧地, 彻底地

words.translation: n. 心, 心脏, 中心, 内心, 感情, 精神, 心情, 宝贝儿；vt. 鼓励

words.translation: n. 腿, 假腿, 路程；vi. 走, 跑

words.translation: vt. 与...结婚, 娶, 嫁；vi. 结婚
words.definition: v. take in marriage

words.translation: n. 英里, 很大距离；[机] 英里, 哩

words.translation: adv. 一点也不, 毫不；pron. 没有人, 无一物, 并无一个

words.translation: n. 图画, 照片, 景色, 美丽如画的人(或物), 化身, 生动的描述, 想像, 形象思维；vt. 画, 拍摄, 用图说明, 描写, 想像

words.translation: a. 富裕的, 富饶的, 浓厚的, 贵重的

words.translation: n. 海, 海洋, 海浪, 大量
